overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia jogging along a winding dirt trail through grassy hills and into a dense pine forest at night. The scene is illuminated by atmospheric blue-green moonlight under an overcast sky, showcasing the game's cinematic lighting and natural environments.

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogs steadily along the dirt path through open rolling grasslands, heading toward the distant tree line under the cloudy night sky

rolling green hills with tall summer grass
rolling green hills with tall summer grass
dark silhouettes of dense pine trees on the horizon
dark cloudy sky with blue-green ambient moonlight

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves at a steady jog along an open dirt trail through expansive grasslands at night. The path winds through rolling hills covered in tall green grass, with a dark pine forest visible on the horizon beneath an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with stone ruins

events.description: trail enters dense pine forest as trees close in on both sides, blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues jogging deeper into the forest as the environment becomes enclosed by tall pines, passing ancient stone structures on the right

entered.detail: tall evergreen pines forming a dark wall along the left side of the path
tall evergreen pines forming a dark wall along the right side of the path
ancient stone structures or grave markers partially visible among the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a dense pine forest where tall evergreen trees close in on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor that blocks the night sky. Ancient stone ruins become visible on the right as the path continues deeper into the dark woodland, with the grassy hills falling away behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open, moonlit grassland gradually transitions into the claustrophobic depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with Geralt jogging along a winding dirt trail that cuts through expansive rolling hills covered in tall green grass under an overcast night sky. As the path advances, the open horizon narrows and the scene shifts toward a looming wall of evergreens that eventually close in on both sides. The environment then transforms into an enclosed woodland corridor, blocking out the sky and leaving the grassy hills behind. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the dark forest, passing ancient stone ruins that emerge from the shadows along the right side of the trail.
